core_mechanism: endowing an abstract space of equilibrium states with a Riemannian metric whose scalar curvature diagnoses interaction and singular/critical behavior (flat geometry meaning no interaction, curvature encoding critical points and phase transitions), constructed to be invariant under Legendre transformations of the state variables
brief_reason: The abstract builds a geometry on the space of equilibrium states in which curvature carries information about thermodynamic interaction, critical points and phase transitions (curved for the interacting/transition case, flat otherwise), with the construction required to be Legendre-invariant across equivalent representations.
